scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'apps/web/.env')" && cd apps/web && npm run build
scripts.dev: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'apps/web/.env')" && cd apps/web && npm run dev
scripts.lint: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'apps/web/.env')" && cd apps/web && npm run lint
scripts.db:generate: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'packages/database/.env')" && cd packages/database && npm run db:generate
scripts.db:push: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'packages/database/.env')" && cd packages/database && npm run db:push
scripts.db:seed: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'packages/database/.env')" && cd packages/database && npm run db:seed
scripts.setup: docker-compose up -d db && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
